meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE. DEVIATIONS LOGGED WITHIN. REASSESS HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE.
meta.completionPolicy: 100% COMPLETION REQUIRED. NO ESTIMATES. NO PRIORITIES. REFINE CONTINUALLY.
meta.blueprintRefinement: After completing any task, re-read and fix stale descriptions.

globalAlerts.warning: INTEGRATION TESTS: Ollama at localhost:11434 with gpt-oss:20b-cloud. Real tests MUST run.
TOOLS: config.mk targets via mcp-server-make. Use 'make make-all-with-log'.
NAMING: 'orchestrator' RETIRED. Use claudemux / claude-mux / osm:claudemux.
CROSS-PLATFORM: macOS + Linux Docker + Windows moo. Zero tolerance.
RULE OF TWO: Two contiguous issue-free reviews of IDENTICAL diff before commit.
BUILD: make after EVERY change. Zero failures.
IMMEDIATE: Use Ollama meaningfully with tool calling. CRITICAL PATH.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: One task at a time, in order.
mandatoryDirectives.subagentPolicy: Subagents for Rule of Two ONLY. Work subagents do NOT self-review.
mandatoryDirectives.runMakeAfterEveryChange: make make-all-with-log after EVERY code change.
mandatoryDirectives.commitPolicy: Commit in logical chunks after Rule of Two.

sequentialTasks.task: T300: Ollama HTTP client — core types
sequentialTasks.description: Create internal/builtin/ollama/types.go. Types: ChatRequest, ChatResponse, Message (role/content/tool_calls/images), ToolCall (function.name + function.arguments), Tool (type + function with JSON Schema params), Model, ModelInfo (capabilities[]), RunningModel, VersionResponse, OllamaError. Default endpoint const. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T301: Ollama HTTP client — Client struct
sequentialTasks.description: Create internal/builtin/ollama/client.go. Client{baseURL, httpClient, timeout}. NewClient(baseURL, ...Option). DefaultClient(). Validate URL. Run make.
Client.Version(ctx). GET /api/version. Tests: happy, refused, bad JSON, non-200. Run make.
Client.ListModels(ctx). GET /api/tags. Tests: empty, multiple, errors. Run make.
Client.ShowModel(ctx, name). POST /api/show. Check capabilities for 'tools'. Tests. Run make.
Client.ListRunning(ctx). GET /api/ps. Tests. Run make.
Client.Chat(ctx, ChatRequest). POST /api/chat stream:false. Support: messages, tools, tool_calls response. Tests: basic, tool call, errors. Run make.
Client.ChatStream(ctx, ChatRequest). POST /api/chat stream:true. ChatStreamReader.Next() NDJSON. done:true terminates. Tests: multi-chunk, cancellation. Run make.
Client.Health(ctx) error + IsHealthy(ctx) bool. GET /. Tests. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T309: Ollama HTTP client — comprehensive tests
sequentialTasks.description: Full httptest suite: all endpoints, error paths, context cancel, timeout, malformed JSON, concurrent. Target 95%+. Run make.
Close() body properly. Tests: mid-stream, after done, double close. Goroutine leak check. Run make.
internal/builtin/ollama/tools.go. ToolDef{Name,Description,Parameters,Handler}. ToolRegistry: Register/Get/List/ToOllamaTools. Validate. Tests. Run make.
Tool 'exec': run command, return output. Params: {command,args,dir?,timeout?}. Safety allowlist. Tests. Run make.
Tool 'read_file': read content. Params: {path,offset?,limit?}. Path within workdir. Tests. Run make.
Tool 'write_file': write content. Params: {path,content}. Within workdir. Tests. Run make.
Tool 'list_dir': list entries. Params: {path}. Within workdir. Tests. Run make.
Tool 'grep': search files. Params: {pattern,path?,isRegex?}. Tests. Run make.
Tool 'git_diff': return diff. Params: {staged?,path?}. Tests with temp repo. Run make.
Tool 'git_log': recent commits. Params: {n?,oneline?}. Tests with temp repo. Run make.
Wire SafetyValidator into ToolRegistry. Block/Warn/Allow. Tests. Run make.
internal/builtin/ollama/agent.go. AgenticRunner{Client,Registry,SystemPrompt,Model,MaxIterations(20),...}. NewAgenticRunner(). Run make.
Run(ctx,msg)→(string,error). Loop: Chat→tool_calls→execute→tool results→repeat. Stop on no tool_calls or max. Tests. Run make.
RunStream(ctx,msg,onChunk). ChatStream for streaming. onChunk per delta. Tests. Run make.
RunContinue preserves turns. ClearHistory, GetHistory. Tests. Run make.
Retry transient (503,timeout). MaxRetries + backoff. Non-retryable (400,404) fail fast. Tests. Run make.
Validate name exists, args match schema, reject unknown. Tests. Run make.
10 scenarios: simple/tool/multi/nested/max/cancel/error/malformed/concurrent/empty. 90%+. Run make.
internal/builtin/ollama/module.go. Require(adapter). createClient, version, listModels, showModel, chat, chatStream, health. Promises. Register 'osm:ollama'. Run make.
JS: createToolRegistry, register(toolDef+JS handler), get, list, execute. Tests. Run make.
JS: createAgent, run→Promise, runStream, runContinue, clearHistory, getHistory. Tests. Run make.

provider=ollama + tool use → HTTP client. Wire agentic loop into dispatchTask alt pipeline. Tests. Run make.
